util)
assert_equalZ
DarwinzVProne to error when run with numpy/f2py/tests on mac os, but not when run in isolation)
reasonc
TestMultiline
.pyfZ	multilinea
python module {module}
    usercode '''
void foo(int* x) {{
    char dummy = ';';
    *x = 42;
    interface
        subroutine foo(x)
            intent(c) foo
            integer intent(out) :: x
        end subroutine foo
    end interface
end python module {module}
    
modulec
self
K/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/numpy/f2py/tests/test_semicolon_split.py
test_multiline
TestMultiline.test_multilineN)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__
suffix
module_name
format
coder
TestCallstatementr
callstatementav
python module {module}
    usercode '''
void foo(int* x) {{
    interface
        subroutine foo(x)
            intent(c) foo
            integer intent(out) :: x
            callprotoargument int*
            callstatement {{ &
                ; &
                x = 42; &
            }}
        end subroutine foo
    end interface
end python module {module}
    r
test_callstatement>
z$TestCallstatement.test_callstatementN)
platformZ
pytest
numpy.testingr
markZ
skipif
systemZ
